name: typescript-7-rc-qa-benchmark
description: Independent QA benchmark comparing TypeScript 6.0 and TypeScript 7.0 RC.

scripts.qa: npm run generate && npm run versions && npm run typecheck:ts6 && npm run typecheck:ts7 && npm run typecheck:heavy:ts6 && npm run typecheck:heavy:ts7 && npm run compare:diagnostics && npm run benchmark && npm run verify:outputs
